title: Can This Ancient Herb Slow Skin Aging? New Research Points to Astragalus
description: A new scientific review suggests that the medicinal plant Astragalus membranaceus may offer promising benefits for skin health and anti-aging, highlighting its potential role in future skincare and cosmeceutical products.

title: Butte students learn about ancient Irish sport and language
description: The Montana Grizzlies Hurling Club visited a Butte middle school to teach students about hurling, a 3,000-year-old national sport of Ireland.
